case_title: NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES VS. JALES VALADAO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 117-119 NEW MONTGOMERY ST. S.F. CA. 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES SERVED JAN-29-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN DOES 1-V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $400.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VALADAO, JALES INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS MR. PIZZA MAN
